scripts.generate:openapi: pnpm exec node --input-type=module --eval "import { mkdir, readFile, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { parse } from 'yaml'; const source = await readFile('./openapi/openapi.yaml', 'utf8'); const document = parse(source); const output = '// This file is auto-generated from the OpenAPI contract.\n' + 'export const openApiDocument = ' + JSON.stringify(document, null, 2) + ' as const;\n'; await mkdir('./generated', { recursive: true }); await writeFile('./generated/openapi.ts', output, 'utf8');"
scripts.generate:types:
mkdir -p ./generated && rm -rf ./generated/types.ts ./generated/_types && pnpm exec openapi-ts --input ./openapi/openapi.yaml --output ./generated/_types --plugins @hey-api/typescript && printf '%s
' '// This file is auto-generated from the OpenAPI contract.' 'export * from "./_types/types.gen.js";' > ./generated/types.ts
scripts.generate:client: pnpm exec node ./openapi/generate-client.mjs && pnpm exec biome format --write ./generated/client.ts ./generated/_client
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:openapi && pnpm run generate:types && pnpm run generate:client && pnpm run generate:zod && pnpm exec biome format --write ./generated/openapi.ts ./generated/types.ts ./generated/_types
scripts.generate:check: pnpm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- generated openapi/openapi.yaml
scripts.openapi:check: pnpm run generate:check && pnpm run build:dist && node --input-type=module --eval "import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const contractModule = await import(pathToFileURL(process.cwd() + '/dist/index.mjs').href); if (contractModule.openApiDocument.openapi !== '3.1.0') throw new Error('expected OpenAPI 3.1.0 document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.healthPath]) throw new Error('expected health path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.optimizerStatusPath]) throw new Error('expected optimizer-status path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.optimizerStartPath]) throw new Error('expected optimizer-start path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.optimizerStopPath]) throw new Error('expected optimizer-stop path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.dimensionsPath]) throw new Error('expected dimensions path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.dimensionByIdPath]) throw new Error('expected dimension-by-id path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.dimensionEvaluationsPath]) throw new Error('expected dimension-evaluations path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.tasksPath]) throw new Error('expected tasks path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.taskByIdPath]) throw new Error('expected task-by-id path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.taskSpecPath]) throw new Error('expected task-spec path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.managerReportsPath]) throw new Error('expected manager-reports path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.managerReportByIdPath]) throw new Error('expected manager-report-by-id path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.taskWriteBulksPath]) throw new Error('expected task-write-bulks path in OpenAPI document'); if (!contractModule.openApiDocument.paths[contractModule.taskWriteBulkByIdPath]) throw new Error('expected task-write-bulk-by-id path in OpenAPI document');"
scripts.build:dist: pnpm run generate && pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsdown --config tsdown.config.ts --entry modules/contract/src/index.ts --out-dir modules/contract/dist
scripts.build: pnpm run build:dist && pnpm run test:type && pnpm run test:lint && pnpm run test:vitest
scripts.test:lint: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm --dir ../.. exec biome check modules/contract/package.json modules/contract/src modules/contract/test
scripts.test:vitest: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project contract
